description: Change that honors continuity, each generation as a wave in the ocean of time - distinct yet connected to what came before and what follows. It represents how transformation and tradition flow together.
rationale: The word 'roshai' begins with rolling 'ro', suggesting the continuous movement of generations. The middle syllable 'sha' uses the soft fricative to represent the gentle transformation each generation brings. The vowel hiatus 'a-i' moves from collective identity ('a') to individual expression ('i'), showing how each generation both inherits and innovates. The stress on 'sha' emphasizes the transformative aspect.
